title: The Treasure of the Dragon
description: Dragon's treasure is a strategy game that combines CARDS and banners. Players gain resources to upgrade their classes and equipment by fighting players or computer AI on different levels of the map, and finally defeat the dragon leader to get the legendary treasure
description_short: Players can access the map option in campaign mode, and choose different maps to fight on. Players can only access three maps in the beginning. You can only unlock advanced maps when you upgrade to the silver or gold level of your current class.
